The white solid product was allowed to crystallize overnight in refrigerator, then filtered off, washed with ethanol/water and dried in vacuo to give the title compound (34.6g), mp 146-148°C.
After 30 min, the residue was cooled in a refrigerator, allowed to crystallize overnight, filtered and dried in vacuo at 50°C. Mp >300°C.
